channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Latent Space] 🔬Doing Vibe Physics — Alex Lupsasca, OpenAI
item.description: 🔬Doing Vibe Physics — Alex Lupsasca, OpenAI

item.title: [Hacker News] Accelerating Gemma 4: faster inference with multi-token prediction drafters
item.description: Accelerating Gemma 4: faster inference with multi-token prediction drafters

item.title: [Hacker News] Three Inverse Laws of AI
item.description: Three Inverse Laws of AI

item.title: [Hacker News] Agents for financial services and insurance
item.description: Agents for financial services and insurance

item.title: [Anthropic] Agents for financial services and insurance
item.description: Agents for financial services and insurance

item.title: [Hacker News] AI didn't delete your database, you did
item.description: AI didn't delete your database, you did

item.title: [Hacker News] AI Product Graveyard
item.description: AI Product Graveyard

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/bwya77 — VSCode theme based off the easemate IDE and Jetbrains islands theme
item.description: VSCode theme inspired by easemate IDE and JetBrains Islands theme aesthetics.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/mksglu — Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 14 platforms
item.description: mksglu reduces context window usage by 98% for AI coding agents through output sandboxing across 14 platforms.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/Arindam200 — A collection of projects showcasing RAG, agents, workflows, and other AI use cases
item.description: Collection of GitHub projects demonstrating RAG, agents, workflows, and other AI implementations.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/LearningCircuit — ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.
item.description: LearningCircuit achieves 95% on SimpleQA while supporting local and cloud LLMs with encrypted access to 10+ search engines including arXiv and PubMed.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills — A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
item.description: GitHub trending repository presents CLAUDE.md configuration based on Andrej Karpathy's insights for improving Claude Code behavior.

item.title: [OpenAI] GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
item.description: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized

item.title: [OpenAI] GPT-5.5 Instant System Card
item.description: GPT-5.5 Instant System Card

item.title: [Hacker News] When everyone has AI and the company still learns nothing
item.description: When everyone has AI and the company still learns nothing

item.title: [Hacker News] Google Chrome silently installs a 4 GB AI model on your device without consent
item.description: Google Chrome silently installs a 4 GB AI model on your device without consent

item.title: [Hacker News] Lessons for Agentic Coding: What should we do when code is cheap?
item.description: Lessons for Agentic Coding: What should we do when code is cheap?

item.title: [Hacker News] Train Your Own LLM from Scratch
item.description: Train Your Own LLM from Scratch

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agentopic: A Generative AI Agent Workflow for Explainable Topic Modeling
item.description: Agentopic uses multiple AI agents with LLMs for explainable topic modeling, achieving competitive performance while providing transparency in topic assignments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Polynomial-Time Optimal Group Selection via the Double-Commutator Eigenvalue Problem
item.description: Generalized eigenvalue problem of covariance matrix double-commutator provides polynomial-time solution to group selection, reducing exponential computational complexity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sparse Regression under Correlation and Weak Signals: A Reproducible Benchmark of Classical and Bayesian Methods
item.description: Benchmark of six sparse regression methods under correlated features and weak signals shows Bayesian methods superior for prediction, Lasso optimal for variable selection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Euler to Dormand-Prince: ODE Solvers for Flow Matching Generative Models
item.description: ODE solvers benchmarked for Flow Matching generative models show RK4 is more efficient than Euler, with solver selection especially critical for imperfect models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fast Log-Domain Sinkhorn Optimal Transport with Warp-Level GPU Reductions
item.description: Native CUDA implementation of log-domain Sinkhorn achieves 12x speedup with improved numerical stability for optimal transport computation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GAZE: Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation with Viewer-Level Tools and Literature Retrieval on Rare Brain MRI
item.description: GAZE enables vision-language models to diagnose rare brain pathologies through iterative MRI analysis with viewer tools and literature retrieval.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] StyleShield: Exposing the Fragility of AIGC Detectors through Continuous Controllable Style Transfer
item.description: StyleShield achieves 94.6-99% evasion against AI-generated content detectors using continuous text style transfer while maintaining semantic similarity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Linking spatial biology and clinical histology via Haiku
item.description: Haiku integrates spatial proteomics, histology, and clinical metadata in a tri-modal contrastive learning model for cross-modal retrieval and clinical prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Review of the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve and a Proof About the Area Beneath It
item.description: Paper formalizes ROC curve AUC interpretation as classifier ranking probability and establishes theoretical bounds.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PhaseNet++: Phase-Aware Frequency-Domain Anomaly Detection for Industrial Control Systems via Phase Coherence Graphs
item.description: PhaseNet++ detects anomalies in industrial control systems using phase spectrum information via frequency-domain analysis and graph attention networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hierarchical Federated Learning for Networked AI: From Communication Saving to Architecture-Aware Design
item.description: Hierarchical federated learning is proposed as an architecture-aware design framework where convergence depends on hierarchy structure, optimization roles, and communication regimes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CGM-JEPA: Learning Consistent Continuous Glucose Monitor Representations via Predictive Self-Supervised Pretraining
item.description: CGM-JEPA learns glucose monitoring representations by predicting masked latent states rather than raw values, improving transfer across measurement modalities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Structured Analytic Coherent Point Drift for Non-Rigid Point Set Registration
item.description: Analytic-CPD improves non-rigid point set registration by replacing kernel-based methods with structured analytic mappings, achieving faster convergence and lower errors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Watch Your Step: Information Injection in Diffusion Models via Shadow Timestep Embedding
item.description: Timestep embeddings in diffusion models enable side-channel information injection with potential applications in adversarial attacks and model defenses.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] EventADL: Open-Box Anomaly Detection and Localization Framework for Events in Cloud-Based Service Systems
item.description: EventADL is an open-box anomaly detection framework for cloud systems that localizes root causes by analyzing event semantic and frequency patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fusing Urban Structure and Semantics: A Conditional Diffusion Model for Cross-City OD Matrix Generation
item.description: SEDAN, a diffusion model combining urban semantics and spatial constraints, generates generalizable cross-city commuting flow matrices.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Flat Facts to Sharp Hallucinations: Detecting Stubborn Errors via Gradient Sensitivity
item.description: EPGS detects stubborn hallucinations in LLMs by using gradient sensitivity on perturbed embeddings to distinguish stable knowledge from unstable memorization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Interpretable experiential learning based on state history and global feedback
item.description: Interpretable experiential learning model using state history and global feedback achieves competitive performance on Atari Breakout in resource-constrained environments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching
item.description: Researchers prove flow matching models can compute sample uncertainty exactly using velocity field divergence, eliminating need for retraining or ensembles.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Graph Rewiring in GNNs to Mitigate Over-Squashing and Over-Smoothing: A Survey
item.description: Survey examines graph rewiring techniques to address over-squashing and over-smoothing limitations in Graph Neural Networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Robust volatility updates for Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering
item.description: Modified Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering updates using Lambert W interpolation prevent negative precision in volatility-coupled nodes across parameter space.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physiology-Aware Masked Cross-Modal Reconstruction for Biosignal Representation Learning
item.description: xMAE framework learns physiologically meaningful biosignal representations via masked cross-modal reconstruction of temporally ordered signals, outperforming unimodal and multimodal baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Continual Learning of Feedback-based Molecular Communication
item.description: Researchers propose continual learning methods for estimating performance of feedback-based molecular communication systems that learn sequentially without catastrophic forgetting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Finite-Sample Analysis of Elimination in Active Hypothesis Testing
item.description: Research proposes elimination-augmented hypothesis testing algorithm with finite-sample bounds showing efficiency gains from progressive hypothesis pruning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning in the Fisher Subspace: A Guided Initialization for LoRA Fine-Tuning
item.description: Fisher-guided LoRA initialization using downstream data curvature improves fine-tuning performance over weight-magnitude-based approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LEAP: Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining for Efficient Transformer Inference
item.description: LEAP resolves incompatibility between layer distillation and early-exit mechanisms for transformers, achieving 1.61× inference speedup.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility
item.description: GEODE provides universal OOD detection via angle-adaptive norm loss, working consistently across all scorers and outperforming Outlier Exposure.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A dimensional R2 regression metric
item.description: Dimensional R2 extends standard R2 regression to arbitrary dimensions with improved interpretability and reduced noise sensitivity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression
item.description: DVISR extends Deep Symbolic Regression with Bayesian inference to quantify uncertainty over both expressions and constants.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Networked Information Aggregation for Binary Classification
item.description: Distributed binary classification on DAGs via sequential logistic regression aggregates information, but network depth fundamentally limits excess loss reduction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] H-Probes: Extracting Hierarchical Structures From Latent Representations of Language Models
item.description: Researchers develop linear probes to extract hierarchical structures from language model latent representations, showing models encode hierarchy at multiple abstraction levels.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DIAGRAMS: A Review Framework for Reasoning-Level Attribution in Diagram QA
item.description: DIAGRAMS framework proposes visual regions needed for reasoning-level attribution in diagram QA while decoupling interface from dataset-specific formats.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Model Organisms Are Leaky: Perplexity Differencing Often Reveals Finetuning Objectives
item.description: Perplexity differencing reveals finetuning objectives in model organisms without requiring model internals or prior assumptions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can AI Debias the News? LLM Interventions Improve Cross-Partisan Receptivity but LLMs Overestimate Their Own Effectiveness
item.description: Study shows LLM-generated debiasing of news through reframing improves cross-partisan receptivity but LLMs overestimate actual human effectiveness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CLEAR: Revealing How Noise and Ambiguity Degrade Reliability in LLMs for Medicine
item.description: CLEAR evaluates how decision ambiguity and abstention framing affect medical LLM performance, showing reliability issues persist even with model scaling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Psychologically Potent, Computationally Invisible: LLMs Generate Social-Comparison Triggers They Fail to Detect
item.description: LLMs generate social-comparison-triggering Xiaohongshu posts they fail to detect, revealing a mismatch between generation and classification capabilities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Theoretical Game of Attacks via Compositional Skills
item.description: Researchers develop game-theoretic framework modeling LLM attacks and defenses, introducing a theoretically optimal attack strategy with empirical improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Compared to What? Baselines and Metrics for Counterfactual Prompting
item.description: Counterfactual interventions in LLM evaluation require controlling for baseline paraphrasing effects to accurately attribute observed changes to targeted factors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Systematic Exploration of Text Decomposition and Budget Distribution in Differentially Private Text Obfuscation
item.description: Research finds that text decomposition and budget distribution choices significantly impact differentially private text obfuscation trade-offs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Controlled Paraphrase Geometry in Sentence Embedding Space: Local Manifold Modeling and Latent Probing
item.description: Research models local embedding geometry of semantically similar sentences using nonlinear fitted surface models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Teaching LLMs Brazilian Healthcare: Injecting Knowledge from Official Clinical Guidelines
item.description: A 14B-parameter LLM adapted for Brazilian healthcare guidelines using synthetic training data outperforms GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 3.1 Pro.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Interpretable Difficulty-Aware Knowledge Tracing in Tutor-Student Dialogues
item.description: Framework for interpretable knowledge tracing in LLM-based tutoring systems explicitly models student ability and question difficulty using Item Response Theory.
